steps.content: npm install drizzle-orm pg
npm install -D drizzle-kit @types/pg
npm install class-validator class-transformer
npm install @nestjs/config
npm install -D @biomejs/biome

{
  "name": "school-control",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "scripts": {
    "build": "nest build",
    "start": "nest start",
    "start:dev": "nest start --watch",
    "start:debug": "nest start --debug --watch",
    "start:prod": "node dist/main",
    "db:generate": "drizzle-kit generate",
    "db:migrate": "drizzle-kit migrate",
    "db:push": "drizzle-kit push",
    "db:studio": "drizzle-kit studio",
    "lint": "biome lint .",
    "check": "biome check ."
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@nestjs/common": "^11.0.1",
    "@nestjs/config": "~4.0.3",
    "@nestjs/core": "^11.0.1",
    "@nestjs/platform-express": "^11.0.1",
    "class-transformer": "~0.5.1",
    "class-validator": "~0.15.1",
    "drizzle-orm": "~0.45.1",
    "pg": "~8.20.0",
    "reflect-metadata": "^0.2.2",
    "rxjs": "^7.8.1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@biomejs/biome": "~2.4.6",
    "@nestjs/cli": "^11.0.0",
    "@nestjs/schematics": "^11.0.0",
    "@nestjs/testing": "^11.0.1",
    "@types/express": "^5.0.0",
    "@types/jest": "^30.0.0",
    "@types/node": "^22.10.7",
    "@types/pg": "~8.18.0",
    "@types/supertest": "^6.0.2",
    "drizzle-kit": "~0.31.9",
    "globals": "^16.0.0",
    "jest": "^30.0.0",
    "source-map-support": "^0.5.21",
    "supertest": "^7.0.0",
    "ts-jest": "^29.2.5",
    "ts-loader": "^9.5.2",
    "ts-node": "^10.9.2",
    "tsconfig-paths": "^4.2.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.3"
  }
}
npm i

DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/custom
PORT=3000
nest g module modules/academic/students
nest g class modules/academic/students/domain/models/student.entity --flat --no-spec
nest g interface modules/academic/students/domain/repositories/student-repository --flat
nest g class modules/academic/students/application/dto/student.dto --flat --no-spec
nest g service modules/academic/students/application/services/create-student --flat --no-spec
nest g service modules/academic/students/application/services/edit-student --flat --no-spec
nest g service modules/academic/students/application/services/list-students --flat --no-spec
nest g service modules/academic/students/application/services/return-student --flat --no-spec
nest g service modules/academic/students/application/services/remove-student --flat --no-spec
nest g controller modules/academic/students/infra/controllers/students --flat --no-spec
nest g class modules/academic/students/infra/repositories/drizzle-student.repository --flat --no-spec
nest g class modules/academic/students/infra/database/schemas/student.schema --flat --no-spec
nest g module shared/infra/database
nest g service shared/infra/database/drizzle --flat --no-spec

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "module": "nodenext",
    "moduleResolution": "nodenext",
    "resolvePackageJsonExports": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "removeComments": true,
    "emitDecoratorMetadata": true,
    "experimentalDecorators": true,
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
    "target": "ES2023",
    "sourceMap": true,
    "outDir": "./dist",
    "baseUrl": "./",
    "incremental": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strictNullChecks": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "noImplicitAny": true,
    "strictBindCallApply": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
    "paths": {
      "@infra/*": ["src/shared/infra/*"],
      "@academic/*": ["src/modules/academic/*"]
    }
  }
}
